name: defines-aliases-1
description: Shows how order aliases are defined dictates which defines_aliases is used.

windows.label: da_1.0 used for da, its defined first in the distro.
da_dup_1.0 not used for da, its defined second in the distro.

linux.label: da_1.0 used for da, its defined first in the distro.
da_dup_1.0 not used for da, its defined second in the distro.
